name: FSIL_OnCurrentDirectoryChanged
title: FSIL_OnCurrentDirectoryChanged
syntax: void FSIL_OnCurrentDirectoryChanged( dword clientAddress, char currentDirectory[]);
description: Is called from the FS IL if a client has changed its current directory.

parameters.name: clientAddress
parameters.description: Address of the File Server client which has changed its current directory.

parameters.name: currentDirectory
parameters.description: Path of the current directory (relative to the root directory).

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
